tasks.label: terraform test: all
tasks.command: export TF_VAR_azure_access_token=$(az account get-access-token --resource https://management.azure.com --query accessToken -o tsv) && export TF_VAR_subscription_id=$(az account show --query id -o tsv) && export TF_VAR_resource_group_name=test-rg-rest-tftest && echo "Token acquired for subscription $TF_VAR_subscription_id" && az group create --name $TF_VAR_resource_group_name --location westeurope --subscription $TF_VAR_subscription_id -o table && terraform init -backend=false && terraform test -test-directory=tests/azure; EXIT=$?; az group delete --name $TF_VAR_resource_group_name --subscription $TF_VAR_subscription_id --yes --no-wait; exit $EXIT

tasks.label: terraform test: resource_group
tasks.command: export TF_VAR_azure_access_token=$(az account get-access-token --resource https://management.azure.com --query accessToken -o tsv) && export TF_VAR_subscription_id=$(az account show --query id -o tsv) && echo "Token acquired for subscription $TF_VAR_subscription_id" && terraform init -backend=false && terraform test -test-directory=tests/azure -filter=tests/azure/resource_group.tftest.hcl
